# gocd_pipeline_template (Data Source)
Fetches a GoCD pipeline template by interacting with the pipeline templates API.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "gocd_pipeline_template" "sample" {
  name = "sample-template"
  yaml = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the pipeline template to be retrieved.

### Optional

- `config` (String) The config of the selected pipeline template. It will be YAML or JSON based on the `yaml` attribute.
- `etag` (String) Etag used to track the pipeline template config.
- `yaml` (Boolean) When set, YAML equivalent template config will be set under `config`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
